user.title: Anker Solix Energy Manager
user.description: Global settings. This integration reads/writes entities already exposed by the official Anker Solix integration — it does not connect to your batteries directly.

data.grid_power_sensor: Grid power sensor (signed W, + = import / - = export)

battery.title: Battery {index} of {count}
battery.description: Entity IDs from the official Anker Solix integration for this unit.

data.name: Name
data.charge_limit_entity: Charge limit number entity (optional, % SOC — the battery's own "don't charge above X%" setting)
data.discharge_limit_entity: Discharge limit number entity (optional, % SOC — the battery's own "don't discharge below Y%" setting)

features.title: Optional features
features.description: Everything here can be left blank to keep that feature disabled. Predictive charging requires a solar forecast sensor (so it knows when solar can't cover expected demand) and, unless using fixed time slots, a price sensor.

data.solar_power_sensor: Solar power sensor (instantaneous W, for consumption tracking)
data.solar_forecast_remaining_sensor: Solar forecast remaining today (kWh, e.g. Solcast/Forecast.Solar)
data.price_sensor: Electricity price sensor (optional, for dynamic/real-time pricing modes)
data.price_forecast_attribute: Price sensor forecast attribute name (optional, for day-ahead lookahead)
data.fixed_slot_start: Fixed slot start (only used in fixed_time_slots mode)
data.fixed_slot_end: Fixed slot end (only used in fixed_time_slots mode)

error.predictive_needs_solar_forecast: Predictive charging requires a solar forecast sensor to be configured.
error.predictive_needs_price_sensor: This predictive charging mode requires a price sensor to be configured.
error.predictive_needs_fixed_slot: Fixed-slot mode requires both a start and end time to be set.
error.battery_name_duplicate: This name is already used by the other battery — battery names must be unique.
error.battery_entity_duplicate: One or more entities are already selected for the other battery — each battery needs its own entities.

abort.already_configured: Anker Solix Energy Manager is already configured.
abort.reconfigure_successful: Settings updated. The integration has been reloaded with the new configuration.
